_metadata.description: Complete scoring of all eligible Cambridge colleges for Engineering 2026 entry. Scores based on 6 weighted criteria. REVISED with concrete Winter Pool import data from 2025 cycle FOI responses.
_metadata.revision: 2.1 — Added concrete pool import numbers, refined all criteria scores

key_data_sources.winter_pool_imports_2025: FOI 2025 cycle — pool offers made by each college
key_data_sources.chinese_student_data: Cambridge published demographics + Chinese education platform analyses
key_data_sources.overall_admissions: Cambridge Power BI dashboard + FOI 2025/510 Chen + FOI 2025/675 Carlo
key_data_sources.engineering_estimates: Estimated from overall college data with engineering proportion (~12% of applicants). Confidence rated per college.

C2_chinese_friendliness.description: Track record with Chinese mainland applicants

C3_pool_independence.description: Lower pool imports = better (fewer pool offers made by college = more direct offers). Based on FOI 2025 pool data.

C5_cohort_size.description: Optimal engineering cohort (80-120 apps). Penalizes too small (<40) or too large (>160).

final_rankings.verdict: BEST CHOICE — Highest Chinese student proportion + strong Engineering offer rate

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: VERY HIGH — Highest Chinese student proportion among Cambridge colleges; strong Chinese society

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 30–35 pool offers made (2025); moderate pool reliance; not a major 'fisher'

C4_stability.detail: Stable admissions; consistent year-over-year; no concerning spikes

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 75 Engineering applicants — good-sized, well-supported cohort

C6_entry_requirements.detail: Standard Cambridge Engineering offer (IB 41-42, 7-7-6 HL; A-Level A*A*A)

final_rankings.verdict: STRONG CHOICE — Largest Chinese applicant community, BUT heavily relies on Winter Pool (84 pool offers in 2025)

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: VERY HIGH — Most popular Cambridge college for Chinese applicants (170+ in 2024); largest Chinese student community

C3_pool_independence.detail: ⚠ 84 pool offers made (2025) — 3rd highest pool 'fisher' among all colleges. Significant pool reliance means potentially fewer direct offer slots.

C4_stability.detail: Gradual, manageable growth; no alarming spikes

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 120 Engineering applicants — optimal cohort size; vibrant peer group

final_rankings.verdict: SOLID CHOICE — Best direct-offer behavior; rare pool participant means your application gets a direct decision

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: MODERATE — Decent Chinese presence; not outstanding but not problematic

C3_pool_independence.detail: ★ Rarely takes from pool — one of the colleges noted by FOI data as making almost all offers directly. This is Clare's standout feature.

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 100 Engineering applicants — ideal cohort size

final_rankings.verdict: GOOD VALUE — Highest estimated Engineering offer rate among eligible colleges; moderate across other criteria

C1_offer_rate.detail: Est. 13.8% — highest among eligible colleges (overall college offer rate 19.4% is also strong)

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: MODERATE — Decent but unremarkable Chinese community

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 25–30 pool offers; low-moderate pool reliance

final_rankings.verdict: DECENT CHOICE — Good Engineering offer rate and optimal cohort size; notable for being a heavy exporter to the Winter Pool

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: MODERATE — Decent Chinese presence; consistent intake

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 30–35 pool offers; known to pool its own applicants frequently (high exports)

C4_stability.detail: Relatively stable; no major concerning trends

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 110 Engineering applicants — ideal cohort size

final_rankings.verdict: DECENT CHOICE — Solid all-rounder with no major weaknesses; also lacks standout strengths

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 25–30 pool offers; low-moderate pool reliance

final_rankings.verdict: SAFE MID-TABLE — Optimal cohort size and good pool behavior compensate for average offer rate

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 20–25 pool offers; low pool reliance

final_rankings.verdict: HIGH POTENTIAL BUT RISKY — Excellent Chinese community and offer rate, but +20.31% application spike is a red flag for the user's stability criterion

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: HIGH — Consistently strong Chinese student numbers; active Chinese society

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 40–45 pool offers; moderate-high pool imports

C4_stability.detail: ⚠ MAJOR CONCERN: +20.31% application growth in 2025 (largest increase of ANY Cambridge college). User explicitly wants to avoid colleges with 'sudden significant increase in admissions.'

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 130 Engineering applicants — large but manageable

final_rankings.verdict: SAFE MID-TABLE — Stable and predictable; lacks standout strengths or weaknesses
⚠ AVOID — Second-highest pool 'fisher' (91 pool offers in 2025) + 2 miles from city centre. High offer rate can't compensate.

C1_offer_rate.detail: Est. 13.3% — strong (highest overall offer rate among traditional colleges at 21.4%)

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: MODERATE — decent Chinese community, nothing exceptional

C3_pool_independence.detail: ⚠⚠ EXTREME: 91 pool offers made (2025) — 2nd highest 'fisher' among ALL Cambridge colleges. Massively reliant on Winter Pool. Far fewer direct offer slots than the 21.4% headline rate suggests.

C6_entry_requirements.detail: Standard (may be slightly elevated for STEM)

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Below-average Engineering offer rate; exists in shadow of Trinity College (often confused); no standout positives
⚠ AVOID — Very few Chinese students historically; low Engineering offer rate. Beautiful college but poor fit for this profile.

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: LOW — Historically very few Chinese admits (~5/year); limited Chinese community

C3_pool_independence.detail: Rarely takes from pool — good direct-offer behavior

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Large engineering cohort dilutes experience; elevated requirements; 81 of its own applicants got pool offers elsewhere (high exports = your application likely to be pooled)

C3_pool_independence.detail: ⚠ Est. 35–40 pool imports + 81 of its own applicants pooled and got offers elsewhere (very high exports). Your application faces BOTH pool risks.

C6_entry_requirements.detail: Slightly elevated STEM requirements (strong engineering tradition)

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Below-average offer rate combined with moderate pool reliance; no compensating strengths

C3_pool_independence.detail: Est. 30–40 pool offers; moderate pool imports

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Small Engineering cohort; low Chinese-friendliness; tiny college overall. The rare pool behavior can't compensate.

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: LOW — Small college with historically few Chinese students

C3_pool_independence.detail: Rare pooler — almost all offers are direct (good!)

C5_cohort_size.detail: Est. 55 Engineering applicants — small cohort; college admits only 90-95 undergrads/year total

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Only ~3 Chinese admits per year; below-average Engineering offer rate. Close to Engineering Department but poor community fit.

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: ⚠ VERY LOW — Only ~3 Chinese admits/year; essentially no Chinese community

C3_pool_independence.detail: Rarely takes from pool — noted as a low pool participant (good direct-offer behavior)

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠ AVOID — Very large Engineering cohort (est. 160); elevated entry requirements; heavy pool EXPORTER (72 applicants got pool offers elsewhere). Almost no pool imports (9) is good, but the high exports + large size make this a poor fit.

C1_offer_rate.detail: Est. 11.3% — below Engineering average, despite large cohort

C3_pool_independence.detail: Only 9 pool imports (VERY LOW — excellent) BUT 72 of its own applicants were pooled and got offers elsewhere (VERY HIGH exports). Net: good import stats but your application is very likely to be pooled.

C5_cohort_size.detail: ⚠ Est. 160 Engineering applicants — 2nd largest after Trinity; very large, impersonal cohort

C6_entry_requirements.detail: ⚠ ELEVATED — Known for strict Engineering offer conditions; strong STEM tradition means high bar

final_rankings.verdict: ⚠⚠ STRONGLY AVOID — Lowest Engineering offer rate (est. 10.0%); fewer than 3 Chinese students per year; lowest Chinese-friendliness score. Do not apply.

C1_offer_rate.detail: ⚠ Est. 10.0% — lowest among all eligible colleges; extremely competitive for Engineering

C2_chinese_friendliness.detail: ⚠⚠ VERY LOW — <3 Chinese students per year; essentially no Chinese community; worst Chinese-friendliness among all colleges
